vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-33671
vulnerability.description: picomatch ReDoS via crafted extglob patterns

statements.impact_statement: Dev-only build dependency (vite -> tinyglobby -> picomatch). Not shipped in runtime images (Dockerfile uses npm ci --omit=dev; frontend ships a static bundle only). Build tooling globs trusted inputs only, so there is no attacker-controlled extglob path. Re-evaluate and remove this statement when an upstream patched picomatch is released.
